## Spec-TDD checklist

- [ ] Spec file(s) added/updated under `docs/specs/`
- [ ] Failure cases enumerated (edge cases, invalid input, error states)
- [ ] Red tests committed before implementation
- [ ] All tests green locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Coverage ≥80% on touched files
- [ ] Typecheck green (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Biome clean (`pnpm lint`)
